docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-02-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILEY, HEATHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHETTIG, PATRICK $3,042.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,092.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT. ALSO, DEFENDANT HAVE NOT YET BEEN SERVED, REQUEST FOR A NEW COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILEY, HEATHER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTIG, PATRICK
